title: CPython imports can pass flake8 but fail on MicroPython
symptoms: Device raises ImportError for typing, pathlib, dataclasses, logging, or asyncio
PC tests pass but firmware fails at boot
wrong_pattern: Importing CPython-only modules inside firmware code.
correct_pattern: Use MicroPython modules, project local helpers, or simple built-ins. Use uasyncio for firmware async code.
fix_guidance: Use uasyncio instead of asyncio in firmware runtime.
